Description: Unique identifier for the single system information record in dbo.AWBuildVersion; it exists to provide a stable primary key for the singleton row.
The installed database build/version string for the AdventureWorks database.
The date and time associated with the recorded database version, likely when this build information was generated or released.
Timestamp indicating when the version record was last updated in the database.

Surrogate identifier for each logged error event, likely the primary key for uniquely identifying log entries.

Severity level of the error.

Line number within the procedure or batch where the error was raised.
Full descriptive text of the error.
